zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Talbot於1337年5月3日出生在英國賀福爾理查茲 卡素時，他的父親Richard TALBOT19歲，母親Joane de Mortmer20歲。他於大約1362年與Catherine de Bromwich在英國英格蘭賀福爾利哈達斯 卡素結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1375年2月18日之前在英國英格蘭艾可維坦，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀福爾利哈達斯 卡素。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Talbot于1337年5月3日出生在英国賀福爾理查茲 卡素时，他的父亲Richard TALBOT19岁，母亲Joane de Mortmer20岁。他于大约1362年与Catherine de Bromwich在英国英格兰賀福爾利哈達斯 卡素结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1375年2月18日之前在英国英格兰艾可維坦，埋葬在英国英格兰賀福爾利哈達斯 卡素。

nameMeanings.name: Talbot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Marcel, Anatole, Armand, Aubert, Camille, Gilles, Normand, Adrien, Alcide, Andre, Auguste.
English and Irish (of Norman origin); French: from the Anglo-Norman French personal name Talebot, a pet form of Old French Talebert, Talbert (see Talbert 1). Compare Talbert 2.
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Talbald, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + bald ‘bold’.

variants.name: Talbert
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin); French: from the Old French personal name Talebert, Talbert, from ancient Germanic Talaberht or Dalbert, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + berht ‘bright’.
Altered form of English   Talbot  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Talbott
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Talbot  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Talbot was born on 3 May 1337, in Richards Castle, Herefordshire, England, his father, Richard TALBOT, was 19 and his mother, Joane de Mortmer, was 20. He married Catherine de Bromwich about 1362, in Richard's Castle, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died before 18 February 1375, in Witham, Essex, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Richard's Castle, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Talbot est né le 3 mai 1337, à Richards Castle, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard TALBOT, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Joane de Mortmer, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Catherine de Bromwich environ 1362, à Richard's Castle, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé avant 18 février 1375, à Witham, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterré à Richard's Castle, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Talbot am 3. Mai 1337 in Richards Castle, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard TALBOT 19 und seine Mutter Joane de Mortmer 20. Er hat um 1362 in Richard's Castle, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom Catherine de Bromwich geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb vor 18. Februar 1375 in Witham, Essex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Richard's Castle, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Talbot è nato il il 3 maggio 1337 nel Richards Castle, Herefordshire, England, il suo padre, Richard TALBOT, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Joane de Mortmer, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Catherine de Bromwich circa 1362, nel Richard's Castle, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì prima del 18 febbraio 1375, nel Witham, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolto a Richard's Castle, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Talbotが1337年5月3日にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアリチャーズ カストルで生まれた時，父Richard TALBOTは19歳，母Joane de Mortmerは20歳であった。約1362年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアリチャード'ス カストルでCatherine de Bromwichと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1375年2月18日以前にイギリスイギリスエセックスウィサムで死去し，イギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアリチャード'ス カストルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Talbot(이)가 1337년 5월 3일 영국 허퍼드실르 리처스 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard TALBOT(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Joane de Mortmer(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1362년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 리처드'스 카스틀에서 Catherine de Bromwich(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1375년 2월 18일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 위섬에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 리처드'스 카스틀에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Talbot nasceu em 3 de maio de 1337, em Richards Castle, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard TALBOT, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Joane de Mortmer, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Catherine de Bromwich aproximadamente 1362, em Richard's Castle, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 18 de fevereiro de 1375, em Witham, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultado em Richard's Castle, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Talbot родился 3 мая 1337 г. в местности ричардс кастл, хирефордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard TALBOT было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Joane de Mortmer, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Catherine de Bromwich около 1362 г. в местности ричард'с кастл, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер перед 18 февраль 1375 г. в местности витам, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания и был похоронен в местности ричард'с кастл, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания.
